name: Karen Mask
subject: What Pride Month means to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Celebration. Reflection. Rededication. Ask around about what Pride Month means, and you're sure to get a range of answers -- as varied and unique as the people who make up the LGBTQI+ community.

My wife and I have so many reasons to celebrate Pride Month. A 15-plus year relationship that became a legally recognized marriage in May of 2015. Careers that celebrate, not simply tolerate, our diversity. Two sons who are so loved and supported by all in their lives that they share their family structure as a matter of fact and pride and without hesitancy.

My wife and sons were there with me earlier this month when Abigail and the rest of Team Spanberger celebrated a win in the Democratic Primary. It's a moment I won't forget. I am so proud to be working for a congressional candidate who unequivocally supports the LGBTQI+ community. We need more leaders with progressive values like she's shown -- and you can help send her to Washington to fight for those values by **[donating today](https://act.myngp.com/el/XXMh8M-edIl-RSIeA-qGgI80XRtfWHOyPVAH_aozsN0=/aOrlM0qu9l8KFBC0mZhJV_udi4YMRPWu5cWUhzD1P1Y=?refcode=Karen_pride)**.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/XXMh8M-edIl-RSIeA-qGgI80XRtfWHOyPVAH_aozsN0=/aOrlM0qu9l8KFBC0mZhJV_udi4YMRPWu5cWUhzD1P1Y=?refcode=Karen_pride)

As Pride Month comes to a close, we're looking forward to a busy summer and fall, full of canvassing, calling, and spreading Abigail's message of inclusion and positivity. Thank you for walking with my family and me on this journey toward flipping the 7th District.

-Karen
Field Director, Team Spanberger

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/XXMh8M-edIl-RSIeA-qGgI80XRtfWHOyPVAH_aozsN0=/2xqeor1KkwLX3YEe0Qvv5ZkVdmpuvzWY5hxLI7Y5JBA=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. Peter, We are back from a whirlwind three days in Fort Worth at the Texas Democratic Party Convention! We joined thousands of our closest friends to celebrate candidates up and down the ticket and commit ourselves to a sustained fight for democratic values. Along the way, our campaign made many new friends across the Texas 10th Congressional District, and **we pushed the party to adopt a[strong resolution opposing family separation and the criminalization of asylum seekers](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1482496/8014833/-1236865643?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzIyMjhlNy1kNTc3LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nFmK_Bo5txY_zuUm7EVyyg2fcDP9sJSMIrgqn4M24rY=)**! My motto is that everything is an organizing opportunity. Along with my staff, we identified dozens of volunteers who helped us gather 2,800 signatures in 12 hours to bring our resolution to the convention floor. We received support from delegates from Bastrop, Katy, and Austin, from organizations like the Texas AFL-CIO and Our Revolution, and even from Rep. Beto O'Rourke! **Over then next four months, we are going to apply this same type of outreach to TX-10, to win this race and help Democrats take back Texas!** Thank you to all of you who helped us with this effort. And if you are from outside Texas, **[please donate today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1482497/8014834/484216227?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzIyMjhlNy1kNTc3LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nFmK_Bo5txY_zuUm7EVyyg2fcDP9sJSMIrgqn4M24rY=) so that we can continue this type of grassroots organizing between now and November**. We have to take this threat seriously, team.

Bob Casey has been a strong firewall against the most dangerous pieces of the Trump administration's agenda, and now President Trump himself is coming after Bob.

**_[Bob needs to raise another $6,300 _today_ to stay on track -- can you donate $5 to help him out? ](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180624_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Bob is running against Congressman Lou Barletta, who President Trump personally recruited for this race. Trump has already recorded an expensive robocall for Barletta, appeared with him at rallies and even endorsed him on Twitter while attacking Bob's record of working for Pennsylvanians. Just this month, Trump once again praised his good friend and close ally _from the White House lawn._

This really isn't surprising: Barletta votes with the president 99% of the time, while Bob has repeatedly blocked the GOP from passing the most dangerous parts of their agenda. Barletta is even campaigning on the fact that, if he had been in the Senate last year, the Affordable Care Act would have been repealed.

He's not wrong -- if we lose Bob's voice in the Senate, we put affordable health care and so many other priorities on the chopping block. Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid would all be at risk, and that's just the tip of the iceberg.

**Bottom line: we cannot afford to lose Bob Casey, so we need to fully fund his campaign. Just $5 goes a long way toward protecting our firewall against the Trump administration:**

Will you make your first donation to help out? "" Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. | | | This email has a lot of information about what I've been working on, but I hope you will take a moment to read it.

**_[I need your support for my re-election campaign, and I want to make sure you understand why and how I'm working to earn it.](http://nm.martinheinrich. * * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the political catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

Last month, the Senate passed a resolution to save net neutrality. I can't overstate how big a victory this is for Democrats. Many said our bill wouldn't go anywhere, but it did. We showed the Senate can still come together and address the issues that matter to millions of Americans, consumers, and small businesses.

We are also making progress on my bill to protect Native American items and artifacts. The Safeguard Tribal Objects of Patrimony (STOP) Act passed unanimously out of its first Senate committee. I introduced this bill after meeting with local students who are pushing for greater protections for tribal artifacts, and I'm proud we've cleared the first hurdle to passing this bill.

And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am looking to protect them. I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area - a sacred places to all New Mexicans - from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don't lose its priceless history.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives. I came to the Senate to represent New Mexicans and our values, and we are making progress that will help people across our state and country.

I am in my first Senate re-election race this year, and all this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme right-wing opponents defeats me this November. name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: What I Witnessed at the Border
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501134957%2501Border%2bE-Newsletter%250115278.10603403.3972211.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501134957%2501Border%2bE-Newsletter%250115278.10603403.3972211.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **June 24, 2018** |
---|---|---|---
| | | One week ago, on Father's Day, I traveled to the U.S.-Mexico border in Texas with my colleague, Senator Merkley, to investigate the reports of children being forcibly separated from their parents. What I witnessed confirmed my worst fears about the Trump Administration's cruel and inhumane family separation policy.

Our first stop was the Ursula Border Patrol Processing Center in McAllen - the center that is locally known as the "dog kennel" for the large pens of chain-link fencing that separately hold men, women, and children. We were not allowed to talk to the children, but we did talk to a mother named Reina - who had fled Guatemala with her daugher after local gangs threatened to kill them both. Reina's daughter was taken from her at the Center and she had no idea where she was. She feared that she would never see her daughter again.

After this stop, we traveled to the Hidalgo Port of Entry - a bridge that spans the Rio Grande, where asylum-seekers should be allowed to cross legally and safely into the United States to have their claims processed. However, the pedestrian crossing had been effectively closed to people seeking asylum. Local volunteers informed us that two weeks earlier asylum seekers had been left stranded on the bridge for days without food and water. Not surprisingly, they gave up and many then sought to cross the river in boats, only to be arrested and have their children taken from them.
Our next stop was a former Walmart super-store that has been converted into the Children's Facility in Brownsville. This facility houses over 1,200 boys ages ten and up. Although we were able to tour the facility, Trump Administration officials refused to let us speak with the children. While it's clear that the employees at this Center were doing their best to care for these children, the place was crammed and overflowing with boys as the Trump Administration was separating more and more kids from their parents.

Our last stop of the day was the Port Isabel ICE Detention Center. At the Detention Center, I heard gut-wrenching testimony from ten women in their blue prison jumpsuits who had fled extreme violence in Central America only to be arrested and have their children taken away from them when they reached the United States. These women were completely distraught over the possibility that they may never be reunited with their children.

In the days following our trip, people in Maryland and in every state have risen up to condemn this shameful policy. And, because of the outcry, President Trump finally bent to public pressure to reverse his despicable child separation policy. But our work is not done.

This new Executive Order does nothing to reunite the children who have already been taken from their parents. We have reports of children in Maryland as young as 18 months old who have been forcibly taken from their parents, and we cannot rest until these families are back together. The Executive Order also appears to subject children to indefinite imprisonment - which is unacceptable and violates previous court rulings. Bringing families back together just to lock them up again in prison camps is not a solution. There are better ways to manage this process that allow families to stay together while they go through the asylum process. The previous Administration had a program to keep kids out of jail, preserve opportunities for asylum, and enforce our laws. Some families will meet the test to be granted asylum; others won't. But, as they go through that process, we should not be taking children from their parents or locking them up indefinitely. There are better ways that have proven to be effective. So please, keep speaking out and making your voices heard. Together, we can have secure borders and can stand up for the values that make America a beacon of light and hope to the rest of the world.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtland=20Sykes?=
subject: The Truth About Children at the Border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE
body:
The Dems are DEAD WRONG | |
---
| | | **Peter,**

Democrats are telling us daily that Department of Homeland Security is "separating children at the border from their 'families'"

**This narrative is a dangerous and heartbreaking lie.**

Northern Mexico is the most volatile region in the world: more than 25,000 deaths due to armed conflict each year.

Compared to Afghanistan, with 16,000 deaths, the United States would be safer today if we bordered Afghanistan than it is right now bordering Mexico.

**The largest enterprise in northern Mexico is criminal activity, illicit drug trading, sex trafficking, and arms trafficking. **

**The reality?:**

**Street children out of Guatemala, El Salvador, Honduras, and Mexico, are being used as mules for the drug trade or as prostitutes in sex trafficking.**

These children are being used by monstrous gangs as shields to create a pathway for drug smuggling, sex trafficking, and arms dealings to cross illegally into the United States.

By having an open border, and sanctuary cities, to help children "stay with their families" we only encourage more cartels, gangs, and prostiution rings to TAKE AND USE CHILDREN as a pathway into the United States to carry out more evil.

To make matters worse, we have a blatantly ignorant portion of the public who are buying into the Democrats' narrative that these children are seeking safety in the United States with their families.

THIS LIBERAL NARRATIVE MUST BE STOPPED. DHS are PROTECTING THESE CHILDREN.

By claiming that DHS is committing "child abuse" for protecting these children at the border, Democrats are going to cause more children will go missing off the streets of Central America in the hands of drug cartels and child sex traffickers.

With the likes of George Clooney and Nancy Pelosi and Rachel Maddow wailing each day about the "cruelty" of "separating" children from their "families," the United States is signaling to the underworld that we welcome any illegal immigrant so long as they have a crying child in tow.

**The depths of this evil is beyond abhorrent. The ignorance of the left allowing this to happen is perhaps a greater evil.**

This is heartbreaking.

DHS only separates children from the custodian if:
* Custodian cannot prove relationship to child
* Child is at risk
* Custodian is engaged in criminal activity

When families come across the border from Honduras, Guatemala, El Salvador, etc. with documentation from their country and seek asylum, DHS does NOT separate these families.

The only reason DHS separates children from the custodian is to protect the child.

While Democrats stand around and call our DHS agents "Nazis" I understand the dangers of the DHS's job in protecting the Untied States and protecting children who are being used to cross our southern border.

I know that our DHS agents will lay down their lives to protect these children and to protect American citizens.

Liberal Democrats only want to make the situation worse.

I have been on the ground on our southern border and Central America, I know firsthand the pernicious evils pouring into our wide open southern border.

We need more senators who understand these issues from the ground up. I do. That is why I am running.

[I need your help. Stand with me on this. I am fighting for all of us.](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=a534ce4c86&e=9da9b0ca31)

I just got off the phone with my campaign manager, and she told me that we are about $6,300 short of where we need to be at this point in the fundraising quarter. Right now, my staff is debating between cutting our advertising budget, hiring fewer staff or making smaller investments in our organizing operation to close that gap.

That worries me, to tell you the truth, because Republicans are stepping up their attacks against candidates like me. The Republican National Committee has already knocked on thousands of doors in Pennsylvania, and they're getting ready to deploy another 500 field organizers to battleground states, including PA. President Trump has been consistently praising my opponent, signaling to his far-right allies that it's time to go all-in on Pennsylvania.

You've probably already heard that Democrats can take back Congress in 2018 and put a stop to the president's dangerous agenda. But that will not happen if Republicans take over this Senate seat in Pennsylvania, so we need to close our $6,300 budget gap before our end-of-month deadline at midnight tonight.

**Supporters like you are already making a huge difference in this race. It would mean a lot if you could make a $5 investment in this race to help us stay competitive.**

Here's the link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180624_fr2_v1s2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Bob

name: Mel Hall
subject: Add your name: protect patients with pre-existing conditions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friend, As the CEO of a health care company, I dedicated my career to improving health care. The company I helped build, Press Ganey, worked with hospitals and other health care providers to champion the one voice often left out of the health care debate: patients. I know what it takes to improve and expand access to affordable health care for all Americans -- and right now, Republicans in Congress are trying to take us a step backwards with a new attack on protections for patients with pre-existing conditions. [**More than 50 million Americans with pre-existing conditions are at risk of losing their health insurance if Republicans succeed. Add your name now: defend health care for people with pre-existing conditions.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hDXnDErCaCG4o2U68FtQU2TH8E78iRO8HyxjUo_uKD4=/nklCSMSCFgJfRejr0Hy3g7-gC29UMlRWbSkXusZMkuk=) We must never go back to the days when insurance companies decided who could and who could not get covered. We need to focus on strengthening and improving our health care system -- not ripping away crucial patient protections. In Congress, I'll always fight to make health care stronger, more affordable, and more reliable. [**Removing protections for pre-existing conditions isn 't just wrong; it's immoral. Add your name now to protect health insurance for Americans with pre-existing conditions.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hDXnDErCaCG4o2U68FtQU2TH8E78iRO8HyxjUo_uKD4=/nklCSMSCFgJfRejr0Hy3g7-gC29UMlRWbSkXusZMkuk=) Thank you, Mel Hall **[Contribute](https://act.myngp.com/el/hDXnDErCaCG4o2U68FtQU2TH8E78iRO8HyxjUo_uKD4=/v_dVbaFhKdiNSqVigH3kNlhlvQp9P2swVZQiMZSMYa0=?source=em180619&refcode=em180619)** | Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress

name: Jake, Team Sherrod
subject: our upcoming Day of Action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- My name's Jake, and I'm a field organizer in Southeast Ohio. The reason I do this work goes back to my childhood. I was raised with the belief that it's important to work for, support, and care about those afforded less than us. But when the recession hit, my dad -- who's been in social work for 40 years -- lost his job. With my mom as the sole earner for a family of four, my parents went bankrupt and we lost our house. All of this happened because the power and decisions of those at the very top went unchecked. Our representatives weren't working for everybody. They were working for banks and wealthy donors. But we need leadership that looks out for everyone. [**That 's why I'm working to re-elect Sherrod, and why you should, too. Take the first step by signing up for our June 30th Day of Action.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff96b/4462dc26/502aef5a/2007b98b/1407266642/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e180624b") Despite all of this, I'm feeling more energized and empowered than ever. I'm reminded all the time that we need leaders who work for the poor, who work for the forgotten, who work for those struggling with the opioid crisis, job loss, and underfunded schools. This year, I've been to beautiful Marietta, up the river to Steubenville, and all the way back to Athens. I'm working to elect candidates like Sherrod who realize, just like me, that flyover counties and states like Ohio are worth the drive. [**We 're having a Day of Action on June 30th, where we'll be knocking on doors, making calls, and spreading the word about re-electing Sherrod this fall. Sign up to get involved.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff96b/4462dc26/502aef5a/2007b98b/1407266642/VEsE/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e180624b") Thanks team, Jake

name: Tina Smith
subject: Happy Pride! 🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
It's more important than ever that we stand strong, lift each other up, and counter anyone or anything challenging the progress we've made for LGBTQ equality. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b1c1/c1f7015/6bd373bb/1142f249/4244036380/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-equality?refcode=rtw_20180624_pride_em") Friend, Today, I marched in the Twin Cities Pride Parade, a vibrant celebration of the LGBTQ community and the great strides we've made in the fight for equality. [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b1c1/c1f7015/6bd373bb/1142f249/4244036380/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-equality?refcode=rtw_20180624_pride_em") I was proud to be working in the Governor's office when Minnesota led the way on passing marriage equality. And now I'm proud to represent a state where all are welcome and where we're fighting the injustices that exist for our LGBTQ family. Despite the displays of joy and pride in the Twin Cities this weekend, this isn't an easy time for LGBTQ Americans across the country. From Donald Trump banning transgender people from joining the U.S. military to Jeff Sessions undercutting federal protections for LGBTQ people, this administration has targeted the LGBTQ community time and again. That's why it's more important than ever that we stand strong, lift each other up, and counter anyone or anything challenging the progress we've made for LGBTQ equality. Today, we celebrated the progress the LGBTQ community has made. Tomorrow, let's keep working together to build an America where everyone -- regardless of sexual orientation or gender identity -- has an equal opportunity to thrive. Tina | **Proud progressive. A fierce advocate for Minnesota. U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for a seat that CNN's calling "ground zero in the 2018 midterms." To keep this seat blue, she needs your help. ** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b1c1/c1f7015/6bd373bb/1142f24a/4244036380/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-equality?refcode=rtw_20180624_pride_em-biobox&recurring=true")

clean_body: It's more important than ever that we stand strong, lift each other up, and counter anyone or anything challenging the progress we've made for LGBTQ equality. | "" Friend, Today, I marched in the Twin Cities Pride Parade, a vibrant celebration of the LGBTQ community and the great strides we've made in the fight for equality. "" I was proud to be working in the Governor's office when Minnesota led the way on passing marriage equality. And now I'm proud to represent a state where all are welcome and where we're fighting the injustices that exist for our LGBTQ family. Despite the displays of joy and pride in the Twin Cities this weekend, this isn't an easy time for LGBTQ Americans across the country. From Donald Trump banning transgender people from joining the U.S. military to Jeff Sessions undercutting federal protections for LGBTQ people, this administration has targeted the LGBTQ community time and again. That's why it's more important than ever that we stand strong, lift each other up, and counter anyone or anything challenging the progress we've made for LGBTQ equality. Today, we celebrated the progress the LGBTQ community has made. Tomorrow, let's keep working together to build an America where everyone -- regardless of sexual orientation or gender identity -- has an equal opportunity to thrive. Tina | Proud progressive. A fierce advocate for Minnesota. U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for a seat that CNN's calling "ground zero in the 2018 midterms." To keep this seat blue, she needs your help. ""

name: Jenna Kruse, EMILY's List
subject: Rewriting the Constitution sounds farfetched. But Republicans are actually dangerously close to being able to do it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c40da/24c69fd9/19938bd3b/188034b9/2414699245/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER56N_digital_email_20180624_ConConRecap_inact&source=WQEFER56N_digital_email_20180624_ConConRecap_inact")
---

Peter,

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and Paul Ryan could get the chance to turn back the clock on our progress in a huge way: by rewriting the Constitution.

And this isn't just speculation. Republicans are close to being able to call a constitutional convention _without a single Democratic vote._

That's because they completely control 32 state legislatures. And they need 34 to call a convention.

But we can throw a wrench in their plans by investing our resources to support candidates who can flip seats and state legislatures.

**[Donate $3 to help our pro-choice Democratic women flip state legislatures and stop Republicans from calling a constitutional convention.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c40da/24c69fd9/19938bd3b/188034ba/2414699245/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180624_email_ConConRecap?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+our+prochoice+Democrati&utm_campaign=WQEFER56N_digital_email_20180624_ConConRecap_inact&source=WQEFER56N_digital_email_20180624_ConConRecap_inact")**

Republicans have been planning a convention behind closed doors, and billionaire donors like the Koch Brothers are funding it.

They've held mock conventions in Virginia and Arizona in recent years and have even started designing potential legislation to roll back hundreds of years of our progress.

But we can fight back! Democrats just need to collectively win 14 seats in Arizona, Florida, Minnesota, Wisconsin, and New Hampshire to break the GOP's total control of their state legislatures. If we do that, we can make it a lot harder for Republicans to call a constitutional convention and threaten our civil rights.

That's why, for the next few months, we're endorsing dozens more pro-choice Democratic women for seats in state legislatures across the country.

**Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women to state legislatures who will stop Republican attempts to rewrite the Constitution:**

body:
This race is going to come down to numbers. The other side has numbers in the form of millions of dollars... |
---

| | Peter, Let me cut to the chase: **[I'm asking you to donate $1 to my campaign for re-election.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e25/7377f838/3cda65c8/51f9de20/2547942188/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marchmmnd?refcode=20180624.2nd&amount=1")**

You may be thinking that a single dollar can't win a campaign. And you'd be right. But if everyone reading this email gives a dollar, that's a much different story. If everyone who cares about the future of Indiana and our country gives a dollar -- then we'll have more than enough to beat back the special interests this November.

This race is going to come down to numbers. The other side's numbers are the millions of dollars they have from special interest donors like the Koch brothers and Mitch McConnell. The numbers on our side? They're our power -- countless grassroots supporters across the state who are demanding results for working families.

Who will win? That depends on whether our grassroots can beat their billionaires. I think we can do it. But it's going to take every one of us doing what we can.

And that's why I need you, Peter. **Will you chip in to help me fight for a bright future for Indiana?** | _I 'm counting on you to help me stand up to special interests and win this election. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Look, Republicans are trying to systematically suppress voters -- _and their plan is working._ They're passing laws that make it harder for Americans to register to vote, or to get to the polls on Election Day.

We should be making it easier for people to vote, not harder. That's why Governor Wolf supports automatic voter registration -- to make sure every eligible American can exercise their right to vote.

I have continually spoken out on the Trump/Ryan dangerous and cruel agenda. That's why President Trump continually attacks me on Twitter.
Trump, his allies, and my opponents like to talk. They like to spew half-truths and partisan rhetoric. They think attacking me will make me back down.

We took to the streets to protest cuts to women's health, to push for greater gun safety in our schools, and this month, to support the rights of the LGBTQ community. These issues matter... to all of us. Together, we can fight back and make a difference.

Debbie Wasserman Schultz

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Why I just went to Nevada
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Hey there -

The world is on fire right now. If we're going to hold the Trump administration accountable for locking children in cages, or trying to rip health care away from millions of people, or a zillion other things, we have to take back the majority in the Senate - no matter how tough that fight will be.
**That 's why I spent all day yesterday in Reno and Las Vegas - speaking at the Nevada Democratic Convention and campaigning for our terrific Senate candidate, Jacky Rosen.**

[**Donald Trump was also in Nevada yesterday - calling Jacky names and trying to bully her the same way he tries to bully me. Can you pitch in $3 to help her fight back and take back this Senate seat?**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd731/4fbb2af3/7ecbe822/5e8be521/2022145507/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc4My1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk783-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
[](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd731/4fbb2af3/7ecbe822/5e8be52e/2022145507/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc4My1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk783-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
26 Senate Democrats are up for re-election this November (including me) - 10 in states that Trump won in 2016. Only a few vulnerable Republicans are up on the other side.

If we are going to take back the Senate in November, we NEED to win in Nevada. And Jacky Rosen is just the person to do it.

After Jacky became the first in her family to graduate from college, she jumped headfirst into the male-dominated computer programming industry. She's brought that same energy and spunk with her into the US House of Representatives.

Whether it's fighting for affordable healthcare, better pay for teachers, or protecting Nevada's beautiful natural environment (a place Bruce and I love to go hiking), Jacky knows what's in the hearts and minds of working families in Nevada and all across the country.

Jacky's opponent - Republican Senator Dean Heller - is the most vulnerable senator in the country, and for good reason. He voted repeatedly to repeal the Affordable Care Act. He voted for the GOP tax scam to line the pockets of his biggest donors. He stood behind Donald Trump and laughed while middle class families are hurting.

[**We can win in Nevada - and I'm doing everything I can to help. Will you join this fight and donate $3 - or whatever you can afford - to help us win?**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd731/4fbb2af3/7ecbe822/5e8be521/2022145507/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc4My1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk783-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

When I spoke in Reno yesterday, I was blown away by the energy of the crowd. It's no wonder why Nevada's remarkable grassroots organization got Catherine Cortez Masto elected in 2016. And that's why we're going to win again in 2018.

But Nevada is going to be one of the toughest races in the entire country. The margins are razor-thin. The Republicans and their billionaire donors are once again going to dump a ton of dark money into this state and do everything they can to keep their Republican in the Senate.

Jacky has a real shot of winning this - a real, fighting chance. She just needs a grassroots army to help her.

[**Please donate now to help elect Jacky Rosen to the United States Senate. Every single donation is another step towards electing a majority that will stand up to Donald Trump and fight for working families.**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd731/4fbb2af3/7ecbe822/5e8be521/2022145507/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc4My1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk783-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth
**Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126**

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
